$bog_norweb_front_gallery_dataset_law_de: Network of norms, references, bodies and concepts of Russian law.
$bog_norweb_front_gallery_header_subtitl: Pick a ready knowledge graph or upload your own document / index
$bog_norweb_front_gallery_mock_badge_tex: ⚠ Mock data — backend is not connected
$bog_norweb_front_gallery_upload_error_t: File too large: %s MB. Limit is 10 MB.
$bog_norweb_front_gallery_upload_subtitl: Mock pipeline run · 6 stages · about 4 seconds
$bog_norweb_front_gallery_uploaded_desc: Mock dataset built by the demo indexing pipeline.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_header_subtitl: Key technologies of the pipeline — click a card for details
$bog_norweb_front_summary_menolite_desc: Open LLM (bond005/meno-lite-0.1) used for entity and relation extraction.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_menolite_fact_: Open weights on Hugging Face — fits the open-source stack requirement.
Extracts typed entities and relations from Russian scientific text.
Used at indexing time; answers are generated with the same open stack.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_mol_desc: This interface is built with $mol — a reactive TypeScript framework with lazy rendering.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_mol_fact_1: Lazy rendering out of the box: a knowledge graph with thousands of nodes stays responsive.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_mol_fact_2: Tiny bundle and zero runtime dependencies.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_nerel_desc: NEREL schema (29 entity types, 49 relation types) extended with materials-science domain types.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_nerel_fact_1: Domain entities added: MATERIAL, PROCESS, EQUIPMENT, PROPERTY, EXPERIMENT, PUBLICATION, EXPERT, FACILITY.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_nerel_fact_2: Domain relations added: USES_MATERIAL, OPERATES_AT_CONDITION, PRODUCES_OUTPUT, DESCRIBED_IN, VALIDATED_BY, CONTRADICTS.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_nerel_fact_3: The schema lives at prompt level — extends without model retraining.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ocr_desc: Document preprocessing: PDF and DOCX are converted to clean text before indexing.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ocr_fact_1: A 93-page, 7 MB PDF is extracted in about 4 minutes.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ocr_fact_2: Tables are preserved; images, XLSX and PPTX are next in line.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ragu_desc: Open-source GraphRAG engine: builds a knowledge graph from documents and answers questions with sources.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ragu_fact_1: Indexing pipeline: chunking → entity and relation extraction → community summarization → search index.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ragu_fact_2: Combines local graph search, global community summaries and a vector index.
$bog_norweb_front_summary_ragu_fact_3: Fully open stack, runs on-premise — data stays inside the contour.
